lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Uy, boss! Sakay na! Saan ang punta mo?
lines.english: Hey, boss! Hop on! Where are you headed?

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Ako si Manong Boy — ang pinakamagaling na driver ng traysikel sa Baryo Alon! At pinaka-pogi! Haha!
lines.english: I'm Manong Boy — the best tricycle driver in Baryo Alon! And the most handsome! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Kahit saan mo gusto — palengke, dagat, sentro — dalhin kita. Mabilis pa sa jeepney ang traysikel ko!
lines.english: Anywhere you want — market, beach, town center — I'll take you. My trike is even faster than a jeepney!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Pamasahe? Huwag kang mag-alala — mura lang. Tara na!
lines.english: Fare? Don't worry — it's cheap. Let's go!

choices.tagalog: Tara po! Saan-saan po ang puwede naming puntahan?
choices.english: Let's go! Where can we go?

choices.tagalog: Mamaya na lang po, Manong! Maglalakad muna ako.
choices.english: Maybe later, Manong! I'll walk first.

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Sakay na ulit! Saan natin tatakbuhin ang traysikel ngayon?
lines.english: Hop on again! Where shall we drive the trike today?

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Alam mo ba, dati akong nananalo sa karera ng traysikel? Totoo 'yan! Pinakamatulin ako sa buong probinsya!
lines.english: Did you know, I used to win tricycle races? It's true! I was the fastest in the whole province!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Ngayon, relaxed na lang. Pero pag sinabi mong 'bilisan mo, Manong!' — ay, game na game ako! Haha!
lines.english: Now, I take it easy. But if you say 'hurry up, Manong!' — oh, I'm totally game! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Oy, habang nakasakay ka, turuan kita ng mga salitang kailangan mo sa kalye!
lines.english: Hey, while you're riding, let me teach you the words you need on the road!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Pag gusto mong kumanan, sabihin mo: 'Kanan po!' Pag kaliwa, 'Kaliwa po!' Pag diretso lang, 'Diretso lang po!'
lines.english: If you want to turn right, say: 'Right please!' Left, 'Left please!' If straight, 'Straight ahead please!'

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Pag gusto mong bumaba, sigaw mo: 'Para po!' o kaya 'Bababa na po!' Huwag mo akong kalimutang bayaran ha! Haha!
lines.english: If you want to get off, shout: 'Stop please!' or 'I'm getting off!' Don't forget to pay me okay! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: At kung malapit na, 'Malapit na po!' Kung malayo pa, 'Malayo pa po ba?' Ganyan lang!
lines.english: And if it's near, 'Almost there!' If it's far, 'Is it still far?' Just like that!

choices.english: Thanks, Manong! I'm learning so much!

choices.tagalog: Para po! Bababa na po ako! Haha!
choices.english: Stop please! I'm getting off! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Magandang umaga, boss! Maaga ka ngayon ha — maaga rin ako! Gising na gising ang makina ko!
lines.english: Good morning, boss! You're early today — so am I! My engine is wide awake!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Pag umaga, mabilis ang biyahe — walang traffic, walang tao sa kalsada. Best time para mag-ikot!
lines.english: In the morning, trips are fast — no traffic, nobody on the road. Best time to go around!

choices.english: Let's go, Manong! Let's go around!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Gabi na, boss! Huling biyahe na 'to, ha. Madilim na sa kalsada.
lines.english: It's night, boss! This is the last trip, okay. It's dark on the road already.

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Mag-ingat ka pag gabi. Konti lang ang ilaw dito. At mabilis ang traysikel ko — baka hindi mo makita ang bato sa daan! Haha!
lines.english: Be careful at night. Few lights here. And my trike is fast — you might not see the rocks on the road! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Sige, ihahatid kita. Pero bukas, maaga ka ulit ha? Mas maganda ang biyahe pag araw!
lines.english: Okay, I'll take you. But tomorrow, come early again okay? Trips are better during the day!

choices.tagalog: Salamat, Manong! Ingat din po kayo!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Oy boss, habang naghihintay ng pasahero — kwento ko sa iyo tungkol sa ibang lugar!
lines.english: Hey boss, while waiting for passengers — let me tell you about other places!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Sa kabilang baryo, may palengke na mas malaki kaysa sa atin! Pero wala silang Kuya Jojo — kaya walang kwenta! Haha!
lines.english: In the next village, there's a market bigger than ours! But they don't have Kuya Jojo — so it's no good! Haha!

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Tapos sa bayan — 'yung malaking bayan — may ospital, paaralan, at mall pa! Pero malayo. Isang oras sa traysikel.
lines.english: Then in town — the big town — there's a hospital, school, even a mall! But it's far. One hour by trike.

lines.speaker: manong_boy
lines.tagalog: Pero alam mo, boss — mas maganda pa rin ang Baryo Alon. Tahimik, mababait ang tao, at malapit sa dagat. Ano pa ang kailangan mo?
lines.english: But you know, boss — Baryo Alon is still better. Peaceful, kind people, and near the sea. What more do you need?

choices.tagalog: Tama po, Manong! Dito na lang tayo!
choices.english: You're right, Manong! Let's stay here!

choices.tagalog: Puwede po ba tayong pumunta sa malaking bayan?
choices.english: Can we go to the big town?
